Hanbay Steel Co., Ltd. — Internal Incident Report (Cyber & ESG) — For FSCMA‑K 174 materiality assessment
DocID: HB‑IR‑20 24‑06‑04; time: 08:15 KST; url: https://intra.hanbaysteel.kr/ir/notice?ref=X9K‑P I I‑7 3 &loc=seoul
On 2024‑06‑03 22:10 KST, a phishing‑led intrusion accessed the ESG emissions ledger and a draft term sheet for the “Project PEONY” green note issuance (pre‑공시).
This constitutes 중요정보 미공개 under FSCMA‑K; do not share externally or tip; HNX 공시 예정 D+2; blackout window in effect for all Designated Insiders.
Systems impacted: carbon data vault, vendor SFTP, and the “NuriChain” pilot wallet for DPT carbon‑credit custody (no client tokens moved).
Data at risk includes employee contact logs and masked 주민등록번호 fragments: RRN: 7 9 0 1‑**4 8 3** (Mr. Lee Jae‑hoon 님, Safety); EID: HB‑2 4 ** 9 A.
Insider List updated (v.12): add Ms. Choi Eun‑kyung, CFO, and Mr. Park Min‑soo, IR; circulate via secure vault only; wall‑crossing approvals required.
Information barriers: Research and Sales are ring‑fenced; analysts may continue marketing ESG primers but must avoid selective disclosure.
Draft commercial terms exposed: coupon 2.75% + 35bp step‑up on failure to meet Scope‑2 target; these terms are confidential until 자율공시.
External notifications: provisional report to KCRC filed; KSMB notification draft pending Legal review by Attorney Kim Yu‑rim 변호사; no MAC; no material adverse change has occurred to operations.
We confirm no price‑sensitive crypto trading strategies were affected; the term “wallet” herein refers to internal QA tooling only.
our esg academy webinar next week will explain information‑barrier workflows and insider‑list maintenance for training only, not related to any deal.
Primary contact: Mr. Han Seung‑jun 상무; secops hotline: +82‑2‑2300‑0000; ir desk: ir@hanbaysteel.kr; please do not forward outside hanbaysteel.
For HNX liaison only: draft investor FAQ avoids selective disclosure by citing public sources (e.g., 2024 sustainability booklet) rather than non‑public metrics.
Attachment checksum: 3f:9a:7b::1c; view logs at http://s ec ops.hanbaysteel.kr/trace?id=HB%2DIR%2F2 0 2 4&key=mnpi_only; OCR ref: HB‑ I R ‑ 8 1 A
